summary: This podcast transcript discusses the 'pizza wars' of the 1980s and 1990s, focusing on the rivalry between Domino's and Little Caesars, as well as the investments made by founders Tom Monaghan and Mike Ilitch in Detroit sports and real estate. While Marian Ilitch is briefly mentioned as the sole owner of the Motor City Casino Hotel, the source contains no direct quotes, principles, or insights from her.
